name: ProDER: A Continual Learning Approach for Fault Prediction in Evolving Smart Grids

description: arXiv:2511.05420v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: As smart grids evolve to meet growing energy demands and modern operational challenges, the ability to accurately predict faults becomes increasingly critical. However, existing AI-based fault prediction models struggle to ensure reliability in evolving environments where they are required to adapt to new fault types and operational zone...
author: Emad Efatinasab, Nahal Azadi, Davide Dalle Pezze, Gian Antonio Susto, Chuadhry Mujeeb Ahmed, Mirco Rampazzo
